        { tab: '.tab-two', content: '.content-tab-two' },

    const allContents = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content');

    tabs.forEach(item => {

        const tab = document.querySelector(item.tab);

        tab.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            // hide all
            allContents.forEach(content => {
                content.classList.remove('active');

            // show selected

            activeContent.classList.add('active');

        });

    });

});

    <script>
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        const banner = document.querySelector('.home-banner');
        if (!banner) return;

        const wrapper = banner.querySelector('.banner-video-wrapper');
        const isMobile = window.innerWidth <= 1024;

        const videoDesktop = banner.dataset.videoDesktop;
        const videoMobile  = banner.dataset.videoMobile;
        const imageDesktop = banner.dataset.imageDesktop;
        const imageMobile  = banner.dataset.imageMobile;

        let videoUrl = '';
        let imageUrl = '';

        if (isMobile) {
            if (videoMobile) videoUrl = videoMobile;
            else if (videoDesktop) videoUrl = videoDesktop;
            else if (imageMobile) imageUrl = imageMobile;
            else imageUrl = imageDesktop;
        } else {
            if (videoDesktop) videoUrl = videoDesktop;
            else imageUrl = imageDesktop;
        }

        // Helper functions
        const createIframe = (src) => {
            const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
            iframe.setAttribute('frameborder', '0');
            iframe.setAttribute('allow', 'autoplay; fullscreen');
            iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
            iframe.style = "position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; width:100vw; height:56.25vw; min-height:100vh; min-width:177.77vh; transform:translate(-50%, -50%); pointer-events:none;";
            iframe.className = 'banner-video';
            iframe.src = src;
            return iframe;
        };

        const createVideo = (src) => {
            const video = document.createElement('video');
            video.className = 'banner-video';
            video.autoplay = true;
            video.muted = true;
            video.loop = true;
            video.playsInline = true;
            video.style = "position:absolute; top:50%; left:50%; width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transform:translate(-50%, -50%);";
            const source = document.createElement('source');
            source.src = src;
            source.type = 'video/mp4';
            video.appendChild(source);
            return video;
        };

        // Detect video type
        if (videoUrl) {
            let element;
            if (/youtube\.com|youtu\.be/.test(videoUrl)) {
                const match = videoUrl.match(/(?:v=|youtu\.be\/)([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)/);
                const id = match ? match[1] : '';
                element = createIframe(`https://www.youtube.com/embed/${id}?autoplay=1&mute=1&loop=1&playlist=${id}&controls=0&playsinline=1&modestbranding=1&showinfo=0&rel=0`);
            } else if (/vimeo\.com/.test(videoUrl)) {
                const match = videoUrl.match(/vimeo\.com\/(\d+)/);
                const id = match ? match[1] : '';
                element = createIframe(`https://player.vimeo.com/video/${id}?autoplay=1&muted=1&loop=1&background=1&playsinline=1`);
            } else {
                element = createVideo(videoUrl);
            }
            wrapper.appendChild(element);
        } else if (imageUrl) {
            wrapper.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
            wrapper.style.backgroundSize = 'cover';
            wrapper.style.backgroundPosition = 'center';
        }
    });
    </script>
